summary: The diff implements all three requirements with good coverage. REQ-28 (registration fix) is implemented in Register.tsx with proper store writes, validation, and redirect. REQ-29 (WhatsApp CTA) is implemented via a shared WhatsAppButton component added to course pages. REQ-30 (logo branding) is applied across sidebars, landing page, login, and register pages. However, there are some gaps: the WhatsApp CTA presence in /admin/courses card UI is unconfirmed due to truncation, and the favicon update and index.html title change cannot be confirmed from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Browser tab favicon uses the Rajat's Equation logo and index.html title reads 'The Rajat's Equation'
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to index.html are shown in the diff summary. The favicon update and title change are not evidenced in any modified file.

missing_requirements.requirement: Every course row/card on /admin/courses shows a WhatsApp CTA button
missing_requirements.reason: While WhatsAppButton is imported in admin/Courses.tsx, the file is truncated before the card rendering section, so it cannot be confirmed the button appears inside each course card in the admin courses page.

hallucinated_features.description: WhatsApp CTA buttons added to the student Dashboard page for 'Account Pending Approval' and 'Account Not Approved' states
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-29 specifies WhatsApp CTAs only for course cards/sections on Landing, /admin/courses, /student/courses, and /student/book. The student dashboard status screens were not part of the requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: WhatsApp CTA 'Contact to Enroll' button on the empty state of /student/courses when no courses are enrolled
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-29 requires a WhatsApp CTA per course row/card on /student/courses, but the empty-state enrollment contact CTA was not specified in the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Rajat's Equation logo displayed in the ReceiptModal payment receipt header
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-30 specifies logo placement in admin sidebar, student sidebar, landing navbar, login, and register page headers only. The receipt modal was not listed as a target.
